query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN c.telegramId LIKE 'channel_%' THEN 'channel'
    WHEN c.telegramId LIKE 'group_%' THEN 'group'
    ELSE 'user'
  END as type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM dialogs d 
JOIN contacts c ON d.contactId = c.id 
GROUP BY type;

    WHEN c.telegramId LIKE 'channel_%' THEN 'channel'
    WHEN c.telegramId LIKE 'group_%' THEN 'group'
    ELSE 'user'
  END as type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM dialogs d 
JOIN contacts c ON d.contactId = c.id 
GROUP BY type;
